holdings.infoBox: DVY is an equity ETF with a total of 105 individual holdings. The top holdings are Altria Group stock at 2.18%, Pfizer at 2.14%, T. Rowe Price Group at 2.12%, Prudential Financial at 2.02%, and HP Inc. at 1.88%.

overview.description: The iShares Select Dividend ETF (DVY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the DJ US Select Dividend index. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of US companies. The index selects roughly 100 stocks based on dividend yield from a broad market-cap universe. DVY was launched on Nov 3, 2003 and is issued by BlackRock.
